description_long: This is a mid-rise apartment building with a modern, rectangular design, featuring a mix of white and dark gray exterior panels. The structure rises approximately eight stories above street level, with a ground floor that includes commercial or lobby spaces and large windows. Balconies with metal railings are present on one side, providing outdoor space for several units. The building is set on a sloped lot, with a retaining wall and a driveway leading to what appears to be underground parking. The windows are arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern, contributing to the building's contemporary aesthetic. Landscaping elements such as small trees and shrubs are present along the street-facing side.
description: A modern, eight-story apartment building with white and dark gray panels, balconies, and a grid of windows, set on a sloped lot with street-level landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, street-facing facade, balconies, and landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the building's length, retaining wall, and regular window arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back facade, minimal detailing, and the extent of the retaining wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more windows, balconies, and the driveway entrance visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern with consistent spacing and alignment across all visible facades.
